nasb.text: “Take an offering from the exiles, from Heldai, Tobijah and Jedaiah; and you go the same day and enter the house of Josiah the son of Zephaniah, where they have arrived from Babylon.

esv.text: “Take from the exiles Heldai, Tobijah, and Jedaiah, who have arrived from Babylon, and go the same day to the house of Josiah, the son of Zephaniah.

cnv.text: “你要從黑玳、多比雅和耶大雅手中收取被擄的人奉獻的金銀；他們已經從巴比倫回來了。你要即日去，進入西番雅的兒子約西亞的家裡。

ccb.text: “被掳到巴比伦的黑玳、多比雅和耶大雅已经回来了，你要收集他们奉献的金银，并在当天去西番雅的儿子约西亚家。
